headline: The Stockbroker Who Quietly Saved 669 Children From the Holocaust
summary: Nicholas Winton organized secret trains to rescue 669 mostly Jewish children from Nazi-occupied Czechoslovakia. He told nobody for 50 years. His wife discovered a scrapbook in the attic in 1988, revealing one man's extraordinary hidden heroism.
keywords: Nicholas Winton, Kindertransport, Holocaust rescue, silent heroism, hidden good deeds
